text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On the way back after a day out with<n>Agnes
Digital, she brings me to an<n>"Umamusume Shop."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're in stock! They've got the<n>goods for the
brand-new Uma raffle!<n>Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I really want the A prize! It's a<n>tapestry with all the
members of the<n>student council on it! Oooh, I'm
sooo<n>nervous!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep, beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hya! It sounds like it came from my<n>body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Everything seems operational. Data<n>is being
received. Heh-heh, very<n>good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heart rate is at 110 BPM. Hmmm,<n>that's
surprising. Just get her a little<n>nervous and her
heart rate rises to an<n>active level akin to jogging.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Tachyon?! Are you measuring my<n>heart rate?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I am. I took the liberty of<n>attaching a micro
device to you while<n>you were sound asleep last
night.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: While I was sleeping?! Y-you meanyou got that close to me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't feel a thing. To the<n>untrained eye, it
appears as no more<n>than a mole on the back of
your neck.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Th-th-the back of m-my n-neck?!<n>Aaaghghghgh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEP!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You're releasing this muchdopamine from imagination alone?!Heh-heh, it's like you're practicallyrunning a race, your heart rate is so high!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze! S-sorry aboutthat... I think I've managed to calmdown.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your heart is tough enough to tolerate<n>such
massive swings of activity in<n>such a short time...
Fascinating, just<n>as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's bring you back to that<n>state of
excitement once again. You<n>can never have too
much data!
choice_data_list: I'm sure she'd be excited if she won the A prize...
Don't put any more stress on her, please!
Don't put any more stress on her, please!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's bring you back to that<n>state of
excitement once again. You<n>can never have too
much data!
choice_data_list: I'm sure she'd be excited if she won the A prize...
Don't put any more stress on her, please!
Don't put any more stress on her, please!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I assume you're referring to this<n>raffle? In
that case, I'll win this "A<n>prize" you speak of and
then give it to<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?! You'd do that for me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I provide the A prize, you provide the<n>data. In other
words, it's an equal<n>exchange of value. Nothing to
be<n>concerned about.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! If y-y-you do that for me,<n>then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It appears the likelihood of drawing<n>the A prize is
about two percent... But<n>there's room for
intervention in all<n>matters. If I put my scientific
abilities<n>to use, that is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Here it is! The height of my research!<n>A success
born from the collective<n>fruits of every branch of
science!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just kidding. Cheaters never win, as<n>they say.
Unfortunately, all I managed<n>was the G prize—a
clear folder.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Please accept it as thanks for<n>participating in my
experi—um, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Beep... Beep beep... Beep... Pssssh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Is this the world that awaits those<n>with a wealth of
good karma? Or is<n>this the place where
punishment is<n>doled out on those who accept gifts
from their oshis?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
However... So long as Umamusume<n>are here, who
cares?! Here, Uma Uma<n>Uma! Where are yooou?
Hueueue! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems her excitement has reached<n>a state
where it has begun affecting<n>her brain's limbic
system. And<n>without even receiving the A prize!
How profoundly curious!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital lolls around in her<n>dream world for
some time after.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... As far as I know, Digital iswell within the limits of what she cantolerate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But, all right. At the overprotective<n>trainer's
insistence, I'll call it here for<n>today. At the least, I
managed to<n>acquire some data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that means I should<n>remove my micro
device. Give me<n>your neck for a second, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
H-hyah! Tachyon! Don't come near<n>me while I'm
already—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEP!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HWAAAAGH! My cells are on fiiiiire!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Look at all this data pouring<n>in! What a
fortunate accident!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As the experiment ends, Agnes<n>Digital looks
languid, yet profoundly<n>happy.
